name: Sunburn
summary: Skin damage from UV exposure. "If it's hot, cool it."
recognition: Red, hot, sore skin after sun exposure

callEmergency.text: Seek medical advice for extensive blistering or very widespread sunburn.

steps: Cool the person with cold cloths to lower body temperature overall.
If the area can be put under a cold tap, run cool water over it for 10 minutes.
Sips of water — helps prevent heat exhaustion.
